content_body:
While enjoying your vacation here in the mountains, be sure to visit Blue Ridge Zipline Canopy Tours. 

The property is what distinguishes a good zipline course, and the 165-acre tract of land that Blue Ridge Zipline Canopy Tours flows through is some of North Georgia's best. The course has over 6,000 feet of cable, allowing participants a mile to zipline Blue Ridge, Ga and it's beautiful mountains.  You'll experience the mountains from the treetops, you'll zip into the valley, soar over pastures and cross over Fighting Town Creek. 

Blue Ridge Zipline Canopy Tours proud to offer one of the best zipline courses in North Georgia. Located only 6 miles from downtown Blue Ridge, Georgia.
title: Blue Ridge Zip Line Canopy Tours
